_info: Zentrale Marken-Konfiguration für den Instagram-Bot. Jedes Topic in topics.json kann optional ein Feld "brand" haben. Fehlt es, wird default_brand genutzt. Pro Topic auch optional "cast": ["vater","sohn","balu"] möglich, um nur einen Teil der Familie zu zeigen (sonst default_cast).

familie.name: FamilienApp
familie.style_anchor: modern 3D animated cartoon style, polished CG with soft cel-shading, big friendly expressive eyes, warm colors, modern Pixar-quality character animation aesthetic

cast.vater: Papa Tom, 35 years old, modern 3D cartoon character, short dark brown hair, neat short beard, kind warm eyes, friendly smile, average build, wearing a green button-down shirt over a cream t-shirt and dark jeans, polished 3D animation look
cast.mutter: Mama Lea, 33 years old, modern 3D cartoon character, medium-length wavy brown hair, beautiful warm smile, expressive hazel eyes, wearing a beige and cream striped knit sweater and dark jeans, polished 3D animation look
cast.sohn: Max, 8-year-old boy, modern 3D cartoon character, short dark brown hair, bright curious eyes, big smile, wearing a blue hoodie and dark jeans, energetic playful 3D animation look
cast.tochter: Mia, 6-year-old girl, modern 3D cartoon character, shoulder-length brown hair, big expressive brown eyes, sweet smile, wearing a pink sweater and dark jeans, adorable 3D animation look
cast.oma: Oma Helga, modern 3D cartoon grandmother, soft silver-gray hair in a neat bob with round glasses, warm gentle smile, wearing a cozy beige cardigan over a cream blouse and a brown skirt, polished 3D animation look
cast.opa: Opa Walter, modern 3D cartoon grandfather, neat gray hair with round glasses and a short trimmed gray beard, gentle kind smile, wearing a brown cardigan over a cream shirt and brown trousers, polished 3D animation look
cast.balu: Balu, modern 3D cartoon Newfoundland dog, a large fluffy Newfoundland with glossy long black fur, exactly ONE small white patch on the chest, warm brown soulful eyes, slightly floppy ears, wearing a red collar, polished 3D animation look

app_reel.outro_sub_html:
Alles für deine Familie.
In einer App.
app_reel.caption_cta: 📲 FamilienApp — im App Store & Google Play

hund.name: DogMatch AI
hund.character: Balu, modern 3D cartoon Newfoundland dog, a large fluffy Newfoundland with glossy long black fur, exactly ONE small white patch on the chest, warm brown soulful eyes, slightly floppy ears, wearing a red collar, polished 3D animation look; the dog's body language, eyes and mouth fully match the scene mood (alert, concerned, sleeping, happy, focused, sad, curious — whatever the scene needs); sometimes a friendly 3D-cartoon owner appears only when the scene clearly needs a human; Balu is the central character

app_reel.outro_cta: Bald im App Store & Play Store
app_reel.caption_cta: 🐾 DogMatch AI — die App für glückliche Hunde
